highlights: Developed event-driven Java/Apache Camel Microservices handling 1k+ events per minute.
Built a Golang application to migrate multi-TB order datasets from Elasticsearch to DynamoDB.
Developed an MCP server in Python and integrated it with Slack to handle support queries.
Built high-performance RESTful APIs for fetching fulfillment details and processing gift card workflows.
Built a library for  API orchestration and masking PII data using Apache Camel, adopted across multiple Microservices processing 100k+ messages daily.
Designed and implemented a Cucumber-based automation testing service integrated with Jenkins, enabling continuous regression testing.
Reduced monthly AWS cloud costs for dlq processing by ~80% after re-architecting to Lambda and integrated with Slack for monitoring and reprocessing.
Designed and developed a full-stack Golang application for viewing order fulfillment status.
Orchestrated and led the modernization of multiple core Microservices from Java 17 to 21, SpringBoot 2 to 3, AWS SDK v1 to v2 and Apache Camel 2.x to 4.x.
Wrote Python scripts for synchronizing data between tables along with report generation for monitoring.
Implemented REST APIs for enabling seamless operations across a multi-tenant DB2 database.
Migrated a legacy web application from Perl to Python reducing technical debt and improving maintainability.
Implemented REST APIs for a custom store to onboard U.S. educational institutions for device procurement workflows.
Implemented REST APIs for a content management system backed by Cassandra.

projects.name: feeder
projects.description: An application written in Python and Flask to convert any website into an RSS feed.

projects.name: pse
projects.description: A custom full-text search engine written in Golang and using SQLite FTS5 extension for search.

projects.name: feedcreator
projects.description: An application similar to feeder but written in Golang.
